CREATE TABLE test_group_1 (value Float64, group_no Int32);
CREATE TABLE test_group_2 (value Float64, group_no Int32);
CREATE TABLE test_group_3 (value Float64, group_no Int32);
CREATE TABLE test_group_4 AS (SELECT number AS value, number % 4 AS group_no FROM numbers(100));
CREATE TABLE complex_test AS (SELECT arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4, 5]) AS value, arrayJoin([0, 1, 1, 0, 0]) AS group_no);
CREATE TABLE nested_test AS (SELECT group_id, avg(value) AS avg_value FROM (SELECT group_no AS group_id, value FROM test_group_1) GROUP BY group_id);
